connection.text: I found my sky today
I listened to the wind
I remembered I am not alone
I let someone in
I felt the ground beneath me
I saw myself in a stranger
I was held by the quiet
I stayed present for someone
I gave without keeping score
I felt part of something old
I let the rain remind me
I heard what wasn't said
I touched the real world today
I was moved by something small
I carried someone with me
I sat with another person's grief
I looked someone in the eye
I felt the warmth of someone near
I let myself be known
I belonged somewhere today

rebel.text: I marched to my own drum
I chose a different quiet
I refused the scroll
I moved at my own pace
I said no without explaining
I turned the notifications off
I made something no one asked for
I followed the long way home
I ate when I was hungry
I put the algorithm down
I ignored the trending thing
I chose boredom on purpose
I did it the slow way
I trusted my own instincts today
I stayed off the grid awhile
I left the group chat on mute
I decided without asking the internet
I held my own company
I reclaimed one quiet hour
I was unreachable and fine
